heading: Purposes
label: 60103 Purposes
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6010336:4803., , .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. L. 101–510, title XVI, § 1603104 Stat. 1736Before clause (1), the word “objects” is omitted as included in “purposes”.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6010336:4803., , .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. L. 101–510, title XVI, § 1603104 Stat. 1736Before clause (1), the word “objects” is omitted as included in “purposes”.

children.text: perpetuating the memory of members of the 82nd Airborne Division who fought and died for this country;
furthering the common bond between retired and active members of the 82nd Airborne Division;
providing educational assistance in the form of college scholarships and grants to the qualified children of current and former members of the 82nd Airborne Division;
promoting civic and patriotic activities; and
promoting the indispensable role of airborne defense to the national security of the United States.
